message:
refactor(ft-api): convert diag/triu/tril/masked_fill from eager to graph-traced ops

These operations previously materialized tensor values with
tensor_values(), computed results eagerly, and created new leaf
tensors — breaking the autograd computation graph and preventing
gradient flow during backpropagation.

Refactor each to stay on-graph using composable traced primitives:

- diag() 1D→2D: construct identity mask tensor, reshape input for
  broadcasting, multiply with tensor_mul to produce diagonal matrix
- diag() 2D→1D: use tensor_narrow to extract each diagonal element's
  row, tensor_gather to select the column, tensor_reshape to flatten
- triu(): create binary upper-triangular mask, element-wise multiply
  with tensor_mul instead of value extraction into a new leaf
- tril(): same mask-and-multiply pattern as triu for lower triangle
- masked_fill(): begin conversion to graph-traced mask application

This enables correct gradient computation through these operations,
which is essential for any model that uses diagonal matrices, triangular
masks, or conditional fills in its forward pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
